source: Cynk--Kocel--Cynk 2026 equation-list ingestion from currently repo-backed fixed representatives.
source_reference: Cynk--Kocel--Cynk, Classification of Double Octic Calabi--Yau Threefolds Defined by an Arrangement of Eight Planes II, arXiv:2602.19413, Section 6 equation list.
selection_rule: Validated records with parameter_status=fixed_representative and no parameter_choice from the currently ingested CKC control data.
coverage_note: The repository does not yet contain a full machine-readable CKC 455-type equation list. Batch 001 therefore contains the validated fixed, non-parameterized representatives currently ingested: 84 and 84a. Parameterized/provisional 83 is excluded.
